name: Hardhat
description: Hardhat — Ethereum smart contract development environment with built-in testing, debugging, and local blockchain node.

seo.title: Hardhat — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Hardhat: Hardhat — Ethereum smart contract development environment with built-in testing, debugging, and local blockchain node.

when_to_use: Ethereum smart contract testing with local blockchain
Solidity debugging with stack traces in development
Plugin-based compile-test-deploy pipeline for EVM dev
Fork mainnet locally for integration testing DeFi contracts
Automated contract deployment scripts with Hardhat tasks

pros: De facto standard for Ethereum contract dev
Local node and console are excellent
review.verdict: Still the safest default for Solidity dev, though Foundry is a compelling faster alternative today.
review.best_for: Solidity dev teams wanting the most-documented, plugin-rich smart contract stack
review.not_for: Teams who want Foundry's Rust-speed and prefer minimal Node tooling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
